name: Fist Enforcer
visual_description: A muscular human soldier in chain mail stands with fists clenched, jaw set in grim determination. Ceremonial insignia marks his breech-loading rifle. Scarred knuckles and a stance radiating menace—this is a shock trooper who breaks resistance through sheer intimidating presence.
full_prompt: A muscular human soldier in chain mail stands with fists clenched, jaw set in grim determination. Ceremonial insignia marks his breech-loading rifle. Scarred knuckles and a stance radiating menace—this is a shock trooper who breaks resistance through sheer intimidating presence.. Stylized digital illustration, heavy shadows with minimal light, organic textures and wet surfaces, unsettling asymmetry, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
